# HUS

HUS is a premium flagship smartphone brand launching the V1 Series — a line of high-end Android devices powered by their own in-house HUS G1 chip and HUSIONOS, a custom Android 16-based operating system. The brand exudes a futuristic, ultra-premium identity inspired by Apple and Samsung aesthetics, with a deep purple tech-forward visual language. Their standout innovation is HUSPrivate, a proprietary hand-recognition security system that locks the device instantly when an unverified hand touches it. HUS targets gamers and creators, with the tagline 'Power Your Game.' and a strong emphasis on performance, AI, and exclusivity.

Source: https://example.com

---

## Power Your Game. Own the Future — HUS

URL: https://example.com

V1 Series

## Choose Your Power.


Two flagship models tuned for creators and mobile gamers — each powered by the HUS G1 chip and HUSIONOS.








Standard






### HUS V1


- Display 6.7" AMOLED 120Hz

- Chip HUS G1 — Built by HUS

- Camera 50MP Main + 50MP Ultra Wide

- Memory 12GB RAM

- Storage 256GB / 512GB

- OS Android 16 with HUSIONOS




From
$699


Add to Cart








Pro






### HUS V1 Pro


- Display 6.9" AMOLED 120Hz

- Chip HUS G1 — Built by HUS

- Camera 50MP Main + 50MP Ultra Wide + 200MP Telephoto

- Memory 16GB RAM

- Storage 512GB / 1TB

- OS Android 16 with HUSIONOS




From
$999


Add to Cart



































HUS G1 Chip


## HUS G1.


### The Chip. Redefined.


The first chip built by HUS. Engineered for speed, AI performance, gaming, and efficiency. Every instruction, every frame, every moment — processed at the edge of what's possible.









### Extreme Performance


Raw processing power that crushes benchmarks and handles anything you throw at it.










### Advanced AI Power


On-device neural engine that learns, adapts, and accelerates every AI-driven experience.










### Power Efficiency


Intelligent power management that delivers all-day endurance without compromise.










### Built for Gaming & Creators


Dedicated GPU cores and media engine tuned for peak frame rates and studio-grade creation.
































HUS
G1










3nm
Process Node



12-core
Neural Engine



G1
By HUS




















Security Reimagined

## HUSPrivate.


### Your Phone. Your Hands.


HUSPrivate is an advanced hand-recognition security system. After a quick setup, the phone learns your hands. If an unverified hand touches the device, the screen instantly becomes unavailable, the phone remains locked even if left alone, and only verified hands can unlock and use it again.

















Locked












Hand Verified












### Hand Recognition


Your HUS V1 learns the unique biometric signature of your hands during a one-time setup. No two hands are alike.











### Instant Lock


The moment an unverified hand makes contact, the screen becomes unavailable in milliseconds. Zero delay, zero compromise.











### Persistent Lock


The phone stays locked even when left unattended. No auto-unlock timers. Security that doesn't sleep.











### Verified Unlock


Only your verified hands restore full access. Complete control, exclusively yours — every single time.


































## Built for gaming.Built for power.Built for you.



HUS G1, HUSIONOS, and premium cooling work together for flagship-level responsiveness.




Get HUS Studio Pro plus Rush Pass Pro  free for 1 year





Explore Technology



Contact Sales

HUS V1 Series

## Meet the V1 Series.


Two flagship phones shaped around speed, image quality, and premium finish. Engineered from the ground up with the HUS G1 chip and HUSIONOS — the V1 and V1 Pro represent a new standard in mobile performance.













Standard

### HUS V1


The essential flagship. Uncompromising speed, precision optics, and a premium finish that commands attention.


- Display 6.7" AMOLED 120Hz

- Chip HUS G1 (In-house)

- Camera 50MP Main + 50MP Ultra Wide

- Memory 12GB RAM

- Storage 256GB / 512GB

- OS HUSIONOS (Android 16)

- Starting at $699


Explore V1















Pro

### HUS V1 Pro


The apex performer. A triple-camera system, expanded memory, and a display that redefines what a screen can be.


- Display 6.9" AMOLED 120Hz

- Chip HUS G1 (In-house)

- Camera 50MP Main + 50MP Ultra Wide + 200MP Telephoto

- Memory 16GB RAM

- Storage 512GB / 1TB

- OS HUSIONOS (Android 16)

- Starting at $999


Explore V1 Pro























HUS V1 Series

Polished hardware, high-refresh display, and camera systems tuned for flagship clarity and creative flexibility. Every surface, every curve, every lens — engineered to perform.

Software



## HUSIONOS.


### Clean. Fast. Yours.


Our own UI built for performance, customization, and speed — engineered from the ground up on Android 16 exclusively for HUS V1 Series hardware.


- Smooth Responsiveness 120Hz-tuned UI thread with zero-jank promise

- Focused Visuals Distraction-free display with adaptive dark theming

- Creator-Friendly Tools Built-in studio suite for editing, streaming, and capture

- Streamlined Control One-hand gestures, AI shortcuts, and smart panels




Android 16
AI-Powered
HUS G1 Optimised

## Inside the Engine That Breaks Limits — HUS

In-House Silicon



## HUS G1 Architecture.


HUS built its first chip to unify gaming speed, creator workflows, AI capability, and battery discipline in one flagship platform.










Neural Engine
12-Core AI





CPU Cluster
1+3+4 Cores





Process Node
3nm TSMC
















HUS
G1








GPU Architecture
HUS Adreno X1





Memory Bandwidth
77 GB/s





Power Efficiency
+40% vs Gen Prev








3nm
Process



12B+
Transistors



4.2GHz
Peak Clock



12-Core
Neural Engine













HUS G1 Chip · V1 Series

## Performance Highlights


Every benchmark redefined. The HUS V1 Series sets a new standard for what a flagship smartphone can achieve — from raw processing power to intelligent efficiency.









3.4 GHz

### Extreme Performance


The HUS G1 chip delivers desktop-class processing speeds with a 10-core architecture built entirely in-house for unmatched raw throughput.









40 TOPS

### Advanced AI Power


A dedicated 40 TOPS neural processing unit enables real-time AI photography, on-device language processing, and intelligent system optimization.









42 %

### Power Efficiency


HUSIONOS and the G1's efficiency cores combine to deliver 42% better battery life per cycle compared to previous-generation flagship chipsets.









240 Hz

### Built for Gaming & Creators


A 240Hz touch sampling rate and hardware-accelerated rendering pipeline ensure zero-latency input for competitive gaming and fluid creative workflows.
























HUSIONOS


## HUSIONOSExperience.


### Clean. Fast. Yours.


A custom Android 16-based environment designed for speed, customization, and a distraction-free flagship feel. HUS built HUSIONOS from the ground up to match the relentless pace of the HUS G1 chip — every layer optimized, every interaction intentional.









### Rapid System Flow


Near-instant app launches, fluid multitasking, and zero-lag navigation — every tap responds at the speed of thought.










### Creator-Friendly Customization


Adaptive themes, modular home screens, and deep creator tools that shape the OS to your workflow — not the other way around.










### Optimized Everyday Efficiency


AI-powered battery management, smart resource allocation, and background intelligence that keeps your device performing all day, every day.






























9:41




Good morning

System Flow
Optimal










HUSIONOS 1.0









AI Adaptive



Android 16


































HUS V1 Series


## Built for gaming.Built for power.Built for you.


The HUS platform brings flagship responsiveness to every tap, frame, and creative pass.

## Your Phone Knows Your Hand — HUS

URL: https://example.com/privacy
Description: HUSPrivate is the world&#39;s most instinctive security — hand-recognition that locks instantly on unverified touch. Only HUS puts your privacy in the palm of your hand.

Your Phone Knows Your Hand — HUS
































































- Products All Products




- Home
- V1 Series
- Technology
- Contact
0













All Products














Security Technology

## HUSPrivate.


### Your Phone. Your Hands.


A proprietary hand-recognition approach designed to protect access the moment an unverified hand touches the device. Built into every HUS V1 Series smartphone at the hardware level.















01

### Approach Detected


The moment a hand enters proximity, HUSPrivate activates — scanning biometric geometry in real time before contact is even made.
















02

### Identity Verified


Unique vein patterns, palm geometry, and pressure topology are matched against your registered profile. Verified in under 0.3 seconds.
















03

### Instant Lock


Unverified contact triggers an immediate hardware-level lock. No delay. No override. The HUS V1 is yours — exclusively.













HUSPrivate is always active. No setup required. No passcode fallback. Pure biometric hardware security — engineered into the HUS G1 chip.















HUSPrivate Security

## How It Works.


Four steps of intelligent hand-recognition security — always on, always protecting your HUS V1.












01






### Quick Setup Learns Your Hands


A one-time biometric calibration maps the unique geometry of your hand — pressure points, grip pattern, and touch signature — directly into the HUS G1 chip's secure enclave.







02






### Unverified Touch Triggers Instant Lock


The moment an unrecognized hand makes contact with the display, HUSPrivate activates at the hardware level — locking the device in milliseconds before any interaction can occur.







03






### Device Remains Locked Even When Idle


HUSPrivate persists through sleep states, notifications, and ambient interactions. Your device stays sealed against unauthorized access — even when resting on a shared surface.







04






### Verified Hands Restore Access


Recognized hands resume full access instantly — no PIN, no delay. HUSIONOS re-authenticates your identity in real time, making security completely frictionless for its rightful owner.


















## Security Benefits.


Built for privacy confidence without adding visual complexity to daily use. The HUS V1 Series integrates HUSPrivate seamlessly into every interaction — so your device stays yours, always.












### Hand Recognition


HUSPrivate maps the unique geometry of your hand — veins, contours, and grip patterns — to create a biometric identity no other device uses.









### Instant Lock


The moment an unverified hand touches the display, the device locks in milliseconds — faster than any passcode or facial recognition system on the market.









### Persistent Lock


HUSPrivate remains active continuously. There is no grace period, no bypass window — protection persists through every session, every handoff, every moment.









### Verified Unlock


Only your verified handprint grants access. HUSIONOS confirms identity at the hardware level via the HUS G1 chip — no cloud dependency, no compromise.
















## Privacy Notes


Quick answers to common questions about HUS V1 Series privacy features, HUSPrivate setup, and interface behavior.





### How do I set up HUSPrivate hand recognition?


During initial device setup, you will be guided through the HUSPrivate enrollment process. Hold your hand naturally in front of the front sensor array and follow the on-screen prompts. The system maps up to three verified hands and stores all biometric data exclusively on-device using the HUS G1 chip's secure enclave — no data is transmitted to external servers at any point.





### What happens when an unverified hand touches the device?


The moment an unverified hand makes contact with the display or frame, HUSPrivate triggers an instant lock. The screen goes dark, active sessions are suspended, and the device requires verified hand re-authentication or your PIN to resume. This response is hardware-level and occurs in under 80 milliseconds, ensuring no unauthorized access window exists.





### Can multiple people be registered as verified users?


Yes. The HUS V1 Series supports up to three verified hand profiles per device. Each profile is individually enrolled and stored in the secure enclave. You can manage, rename, or remove verified profiles at any time from Settings > Privacy > HUSPrivate. Adding a new profile requires authentication from an existing verified hand.





### What if I injure my hand or cannot complete hand recognition?


If hand recognition fails — due to injury, gloves, or other circumstances — you can always unlock the device using your PIN, password, or pattern as a fallback. We recommend setting a strong PIN during setup precisely for these situations. Recovery access is never dependent solely on biometric authentication.





### Is my biometric data backed up to the cloud?


No. All HUSPrivate biometric data — including hand geometry maps and recognition templates — is stored exclusively within the HUS G1 chip's isolated secure enclave on your physical device. This data is never included in cloud backups, never transmitted over any network, and cannot be extracted by HUS or any third party. Resetting or replacing your device requires re-enrollment.





### Does HUSIONOS collect usage data by default?


HUSIONOS is configured with minimal data collection by default. Diagnostic and analytics sharing is opt-in only and can be reviewed or revoked at any time under Settings > Privacy > Data & Diagnostics. Core system functions, including HUSPrivate, operate entirely offline and do not depend on or contribute to any telemetry pipeline.





### Is the HUS V1 interface available in right-to-left languages?


Yes. HUSIONOS includes full logical-direction support, meaning the interface adapts automatically to both left-to-right and right-to-left reading directions based on the system language selected. All privacy menus, HUSPrivate enrollment screens, and notification text render correctly in Arabic, Hebrew, Persian, Urdu, and other RTL languages without any additional configuration.





### How does HUS handle privacy policy updates?


When our privacy policy is updated, you will receive an in-system notification via HUSIONOS before the changes take effect. A summary of what changed is presented clearly alongside the full revised document. Continued use of HUS services after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the updated terms. You can review the current version at any time from Settings > Privacy > Privacy Policy.







The HUS V1 Series and HUSIONOS are designed for global readiness. Interface layouts, privacy controls, and all system text support both LTR and RTL logical directions, ensuring a consistent and accessible experience for users across all supported regions and languages.








Next-generation mobile technology engineered for those who demand more. The V1 Series redefines what a flagship can be.

## Return Policy

URL: https://example.com/return-policy
Description: Return policy - your rights for returns and exchanges

Return Policy - HUS





































































- Products All Products




- Home
- V1 Series
- Technology
- Contact
0












All Products










# Return Policy


Last Updated: 5/4/2026



At HUS, we want you to be satisfied with your purchase. This policy outlines your rights for returns and refunds.


## 1. Return Window


You may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.


- Items must be unused and in original condition

- Items must be in original packaging

- Receipt or proof of purchase required




## 2. Non-Returnable Items


- Perishable goods

- Custom or personalized items

- Digital products and opened software

- Personal hygiene products that have been opened




## 3. Damaged or Defective Items


If you receive a damaged or defective item, contact us within 48 hours for a full refund including shipping costs.


## 4. Contact Us



For returns or questions:


Email: [business_email]


Phone: [business_phone]


Address: [business_address]

# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  5/4/2026



HUS ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: HUS

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://example.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement


































- Products All Products




- Home
- V1 Series

0















# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  May 4, 2026



HUS is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: HUS

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.









Next-generation mobile technology engineered for those who demand more. The V1 Series redefines what a flagship can be.

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  May 4, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - HUS

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - consumer electronics / mobile technology provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


HUS provides consumer electronics / mobile technology through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by HUS. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: HUS

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
